mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(t.name ORDER BY t.total DESC) AS nameList, GROUP_CONCAT(t.total ORDER BY t.total DESC) AS numberList FROM ( SELECT od.name, SUM(od.number) AS total FROM order_detail od JOIN orders o ON od.order_id = o.id WHERE o.order_time BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end} GROUP BY od.name LIMIT 10 ) AS t;
